creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=dialog&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD#SEE_ALSO>

* does not exist, as a section
* should include a link to dialog(3). 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=dialog&sektion=3&manpath=FreeBSD#SEE_ALSO>

* is           dialog (1).    not linked
* should be    dialog(1).         linked.
